title: James Nelson | Chief Financial Officer | Colombo & Hurd, PL
content:
## Chief Financial Officer
Request A Consultation
James Nelson is the Chief Financial Officer at Colombo & Hurd, PL, where he contributes over 30 years of finance and accounting experience from various sectors, with a pronounced emphasis on legal services, particularly in immigration law. His recent roles in the legal field have honed his expertise in financial strategy and operations, aligning with the firm’s commitment to excellence and robust financial management.
His career has seen significant responsibilities, such as managing the finance function at a leading immigration law firm, where he played a crucial role in strategic financial planning and operational efficiency. His tenure at a global commercial real estate company and a major telecommunications firm provided him with invaluable insights into the financial mechanisms of large corporations, equipping him with the skills to implement scalable and insightful financial strategies.
Mr. Nelson’s journey has brought him to Colombo & Hurd, PL, where he is a pivotal figure in the firm’s financial strategy and stewardship. His comprehensive experience, ability to navigate complex financial landscapes, and commitment to collaborative success are vital to the firm’s mission to provide outstanding legal services and maintain financial health and growth.
With a Bachelor of Science in Accounting and expertise in various financial and technological tools, Nelson is adept at guiding financial decisions and strategies that underpin the firm’s commitment to delivering exceptional legal advice and maintaining its reputation for quality in the legal community.
